history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot of a mobile transaction detail page with a blue and white layout showing a completed payment and an optional tip section.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a “Detail Transaksi” screen displaying a completed transaction with a status icon, transaction title line, and billing details including a total amount and payment method information, followed by a tip prompt and a help button.

Setting:
This is an indoor digital interface screenshot of a smartphone app, shown in portrait orientation with a status bar at the top and no visible outdoor context.

Visual Details:
The top area is bright blue with the screen title “Detail Transaksi” in white text, and a white card-like panel centered below it. Inside the card, there is a logo consisting of a blue circle with a white mark and the word “BISNIS” in blue. Below the logo, a date and time line appears on the left in small text, and an ID line appears on the right. A row contains a green circular check icon and the text indicating the transaction success. The next section includes a bold line for the payment destination, and a highlighted light-blue bar containing “Total Bayar” on the left and a rupiah total on the right, with a small down-caret symbol next to the total. Further down are two labeled lines for “Metode Pembayaran” and “Saldo DANA (SmartPay)”. A blue button with white text spans the width near the bottom of the card area. Below the card, another section shows a light background with an icon resembling a bottle and a phone-like symbol, a tip message, and four gray-outlined pill buttons with “Rp200”, “Rp350”, “Rp500”, and “Rp600”. Under those pills is a light gray button labeled “KIRIM”. A final line of text mentions the tipping deadline. At the bottom there is a bordered blue help box with an icon and the text “BUTUH BANTUAN?”. The overall design uses clean sans-serif typography, rounded shapes, and high-contrast blue and white colors.

Visible Text:
5:11 PM
Detail Transaksi
BISNIS
06 Jul 2026 • 17:11
ID DANA 0878…..6048
Transaksi berhasil!
Pembayaran ke Zyrey Store Lo
Total Bayar
Rp18.000
Metode Pembayaran
Saldo DANA (SmartPay)
Detail Transaksi
BUAT PATUNGAN
Semangatin merchant pakai tip!
Rp200
Rp350
Rp500
Rp600
KIRIM
Kamu bisa kasih tip sampai 10 hari setelah transaksi
BUTUH BANTUAN?

Practical Summary:
The image shows a smartphone screen with transaction details indicating a successful payment and the total amount. It also includes an option to send a tip with preset amounts and a help button at the bottom.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

# Structured Version

## Header
- Detail Transaksi

## Transaction Info
- Tanggal/Waktu: 06 Jul 2026 · 17:11

## Status
- Transaksi berhasil!

## Payment Details

- Metode Pembayaran: [unclear]  
- Saldo: **DANA (SmartPay)**

## Actions/Links

- **BUAT PATUNGAN**

## Tip Section

- Pilihan tip: Rp200 | Rp350 | Rp500 | Rp600
- Tombol: **KIRIM**

# Notes
- Bagian **“Metode Pembayaran”** tidak terbaca jelas pada screenshot (hanya labelnya yang terlihat).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
